name: sql-builder-ai
description: Sql Builder Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: build_select
tools.description: Build a SELECT SQL query from structured parameters.

tools.name: build_insert
tools.description: Build an INSERT SQL query from a list of row dicts.

tools.name: explain_query
tools.description: Analyze and explain a SQL query's structure and components.

tools.name: optimize_query_hints
tools.description: Suggest optimizations for a SQL query.
